text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 A few hours ago, a fire broke out north of the Amka settlement due to a rocket strike.
NEW: After more than 48 days of a near-total internet shutdown in Iran, limited access is beginning to return, with users now able to use Google search again. Source: RKhanizadeh (at X)

🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The commander of the 52nd Battalion is still under anesthesia and on artificial respiration at Rambam Hospital, where he was injured during the battles in Bint Jbeil. A number of soldiers from the Paratroopers Brigade, who were also injured in the battle, are hospitalized there, including a doctor and a paramedic who were injured while evacuating the wounded in the clash area. — The Hebrew newspaper Yediot Ahronot

Open Source Intel Unbelievable images of a U.S. KC-135R refueling aircraft, tail number 59-1444, which returned to the U.S. two days ago after operations in the Middle East as part of the campaign against Iran. According to reports, the aircraft was hit in an Iranian missile attack at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. Other aircraft were also damaged, including an E-3 AWACS, which was completely destroyed. The tanker made the entire journey back to the U.S., with stopovers, covered in tape from nose to tail. @ItayBlumental tweet

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 David Ignatius: 🗣️ Trump is simultaneously playing both the “good cop” and “bad cop” roles. 📌 He is not interested in prolonging the war and is focused on bringing it to an end. 📌 The naval blockade is being used as a tool of economic pressure rather than purely military force. 📌 His strategy is to push Iran to the point where it is forced to concede. 📌 The United States is also offering significant economic incentives, aiming to encourage Iran to accept a deal and move toward what officials describe as a “golden bridge” to the future. tweet

↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: ""After the searches were completed, the forces destroyed approximately 70 terror infrastructures within just one minute," the IDF says." Three paratrooper brigades, the Givati ​​Brigade, the 401st Armored Brigade, and engineering battalions are operating in Bint Jbeil. Yes, all this for a town no more than 3 kilometers from the border, in an area largely destroyed two years ago. While the importance of Bint Jbeil to the resistance cannot be denied, what the Israeli enemy is currently doing goes beyond a purely military operation. The operation in Bint Jbeil has transcended its military objective, becoming a bloody act of revenge—revenge against both people and property, a complex that has plagued the enemy for over 20 years.

Europe could have “maybe 6 weeks or so (of) jet fuel left,” according to Fatih Birol of the International Energy Agency, due to supply disruptions linked to the Iran conflict and blockages around the Strait of Hormuz. He warned of possible flight disruptions, saying “some of the flights… might be canceled as a result of lack of jet fuel.” Birol called the situation “the largest energy crisis we have ever faced.” Source: AP
text_zh: 据国际能源署的法提赫·比罗尔（Fatih Birol）称，由于与伊朗冲突和霍尔木兹海峡周边封锁相关的供应中断，欧洲“可能只剩下大约6周左右的航空燃油”。他警告称可能会出现航班中断，并表示“一些航班……可能会因为缺乏航空燃油而被取消”。比罗尔称这种情况是“我们所面临的最大能源危机”。来源：美联社

text: Overnight the Israeli army pushed towards Qantara town. Hezbullah targeted and damaged 4 tanks and 2 APCs. Clashes are ongoing
text_zh: 一夜之间，以色列军队向坎塔拉（Qantara）镇推进。真主党瞄准并损坏了4辆坦克和2辆装甲运兵车。冲突仍在持续

text: 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 U.S. occupation forces withdrew from the Qasrak base in Hasakah, Syria, toward Jordan, reportedly destroying their positions as they left. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 美国占领军从叙利亚哈塞克的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地撤往约旦，据报道他们在离开时摧毁了自己的阵地。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: David Ignatius: Trump plays both good cop and bad cop at the same time. He didn’t want to keep fighting this war. He wants to end it. He’s using the blockade for an economic chokehold. Trump is waiting for Iran to tap out. The U.S. has promised substantial economic aid to Iran, all kinds of inducements to get them to cross what one official called “the golden bridge into the future.”
text_zh: 大卫·伊格内修斯（David Ignatius）：特朗普同时扮演红脸和白脸。他不想继续打这场战争。他想结束它。他正在利用封锁进行经济扼杀。特朗普在等待伊朗认输。美国已承诺向伊朗提供大量经济援助，并提供各种诱因，促使他们跨越一位官员所称的“通往未来的黄金桥梁”。

text: German‑based media group Axel Springer SE, which is acquiring The Daily Telegraph, outlined mandatory “core values” for staff. These include explicit support for Israel. Some quotes from his letter to the staff: There is no such thing as neutral journalism. We support the right of Israel to exist. NOTE: Axel Springer also owns media groups like Bild, Die Welt, Politico, and Business Insider. SOURCE
text_zh: 总部位于德国的媒体集团阿克塞尔·斯普林格（Axel Springer SE）正在收购《每日电讯报》，该集团为其员工制定了强制性的“核心价值观”。其中包括明确支持以色列。以下是他致员工信中的一些引述：不存在所谓的中立新闻。我们支持以色列的生存权。注：阿克塞尔·斯普林格还拥有《图片报》、《世界报》、《政客》和《商业内幕》等媒体集团。来源

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🤡 🇸🇮 Slovenia’s newly elected parliamentary speaker has announced plans to visit Russia and push for the country’s withdrawal from NATO. 🔹 Speaker Zoran Stevanović, leader of the eurosceptic Resnica party, said he intends to travel to Moscow soon to “build bridges” between the West and the East. 🔹 He also announced a referendum on Slovenia leaving the alliance, which it joined in 2004. 🔹 Stevanović supports the gradual lifting of sanctions on Russia, describing his stance as “pro-Slovenian.” 🔹 His election came as a surprise, as Prime Minister Golob’s pro-European bloc won the elections, but required Resnica’s support to form a coalition. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🤡 🇸🇮 斯洛文尼亚新当选的议会议长宣布计划访问俄罗斯，并推动该国退出北约。🔹 议长佐兰·斯特瓦诺维奇（Zoran Stevanović）是欧洲怀疑论政党 Resnica 的领导人，他表示打算近期前往莫斯科，在东西方之间“架起桥梁”。🔹 他还宣布将就斯洛文尼亚退出该联盟（于2004年加入）举行全民公投。🔹 斯特瓦诺维奇支持逐步解除对俄制裁，称其立场为“亲斯洛文尼亚”。🔹 他的当选令人意外，因为戈洛布总理的亲欧集团赢得了选举，但需要 Resnica 的支持才能组建联合政府。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. forces withdrawing from the Kasrak base in Hasakah, Syria, to Jordan. Much of the material inside the base was destroyed prior to departure. The base will be handed over to the 60th Division under the command of Çiya Kobani. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044729016590987736/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美军正从叙利亚哈塞克的卡斯拉克（Kasrak）基地撤往约旦。基地内的大部分物资在撤离前已被销毁。该基地将移交给由齐亚·科巴尼（Çiya Kobani）指挥的第60师。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044729016590987736/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, in a meeting with the British Minister of State for the Middle East, said the ceasefire Lebanon is demanding from Israel would be "the natural entry point for direct negotiations between the two countries, in line with the Lebanese presidential initiative." He added that Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory is "an essential step to ensuring the ceasefire, completing the deployment of the Lebanese army to the international borders, and fully establishing state authority, while ending all expressions of armed presence." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）在与英国中东事务国务大臣会晤时表示，黎巴嫩要求以色列实现的停火将是“根据黎巴嫩总统倡议，两国进行直接谈判的自然切入点”。他补充说，以色列从黎巴嫩领土撤军是“确保停火、完成黎巴嫩军队在国际边界的部署、全面建立国家权威并结束所有武装存在表现的关键一步”。推文

After completing searches, approximately 70 terror infrastructure sites were dismantled in one minute. Dozens of terrorists were eliminated in a separate operation. tweet

Destruction was reported across four districts, with cars catching fire and damage to a warehouse, a tire repair shop, and a store. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯昨晚使用无人机和弹道导弹袭击后的情况：在基辅，5人死亡（包括一名儿童），另有21人受伤。四个地区报告了破坏情况，汽车起火，仓库、轮胎修理店和商店受损。推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC: "If necessary, Iran can sink all US ships in the Persian Gulf that are within the range of its missiles." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）：“如有必要，伊朗可以击沉波斯湾内所有在其导弹射程范围内的美国舰船。”推文

text: 🇮🇷 Iran Army Executive Deputy, Brigadier General Sheikh: Army's destructive drone production increased 10 times. The production rate of our destructive drones in the 7 months after the twelve-day war was 10 times that of the period before it. All operational plans executed in the third imposed war were written by the martyr Lieutenant General Mousavi 7 months before this war and communicated to all forces including Aerospace and the Army. If the enemy wants to carry out an operation again, the Islamic Republic system will undoubtedly counter it with the foresight it has previously made.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗陆军执行副司令谢赫准将：陆军破坏性无人机的产量增加了10倍。我们在十二天战争后7个月内破坏性无人机的生产率是战前时期的10倍。第三次强加战争中执行的所有作战计划，都是由烈士穆萨维中将在战争前7个月编写的，并传达给了包括航空航天部队和陆军在内的所有部队。如果敌人想再次进行行动，伊斯兰共和国体制无疑将以其预先做出的远见卓识进行反击。

text: 🇮🇷 Spokesperson of the Iranian Army: Amir Hatami ordered that in the event of a ground invasion of the country, not a single invader should be left alive. Brigadier General Akraminia said in a televised interview that he must especially remember the martyrs who were killed in the operation to counter American infiltration in southern Isfahan. We lost four martyrs there; Second Brigadier General Masoud Zare, a professor and commander of the Army Ground Force Air Defense Faculty, bravely entered that operation. The order also came from the Commander-in-Chief of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army that if a ground invasion of the country occurs, it must be dealt with seriously, and he emphasized that not a single invader should be left alive.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗军队发言人：阿米尔·哈塔米下令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。阿克拉米尼亚准将在电视采访中表示，他必须特别铭记在反击美国渗透伊朗南部伊斯法罕的行动中牺牲的烈士。我们在那里失去了四位烈士；陆军地面部队防空学院教授兼指挥官马苏德·扎雷准将勇敢地参加了那次行动。伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队总司令也下达了命令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，必须严肃对待，并强调绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。

text: NEW: Türkiye announces it will increase its number of commando brigades. New brigades will be structured differently from existing ones, designed to better match current threats and modern operational concepts. Earlier reports speculate on targets like adding 15 new brigades.
text_zh: 最新消息：土耳其宣布将增加其突击旅的数量。新组建的旅将采用与现有旅不同的结构，旨在更好地适应当前的威胁和现代作战概念。早先的报道推测目标包括增加15个新旅。

text: BREAKING: The U.S. appears to have ended its military presence in Syria with the last convoy leaving the Qasrak base in the northeast. Control of the area is now shifting to Syrian forces. This effectively ends the U.S. ground presence that began in 2014.
text_zh: 突发：美国似乎已结束其在叙利亚的军事存在，最后一支车队已离开位于东北部的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地。该地区的控制权现正移交给叙利亚军队。这实际上结束了自2014年开始的美国地面存在。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir is reportedly set to visit Washington tomorrow following a trip to Iran, as part of regional mediation efforts, a Pakistani security source told Al Jazeera.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据半岛电视台援引巴基斯坦安全消息人士的话报道，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅在访问伊朗后，据称将于明天访问华盛顿，作为地区调解努力的一部分。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir met with Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in Tehran on Thursday.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅周四在德黑兰会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Genocide in Lebanon! Israeli warplanes strike Al-Qasmiyeh Bridge, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩发生种族灭绝！以色列战机袭击了黎巴嫩南部的卡斯米耶（Al-Qasmiyeh）大桥。
